productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Red Black Shoe
description: Perfect for those casual days, these ultralight canvas shoes from numero uno are a great addition of comfort to your wardrobe. This range of shoes comes with a contrast coloured tongue for additional style. Team these with jeans and tees or skirts for a cool, casual look.Upper Canvas upper for durability, sweat absorption enabling ventilation and easy maintenance Metallic eyelets on the medial side for ventilation Lace-up system with metallic eyelets for snug Fit and durability Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life and for style Long tongue with embroidered brand name Rubber toe box for durability and protection to the forefoot Branding printed on lateral side and on the heel cup Midsole Phylon midsole for durability and lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Cambreel lining the soft padded insole for excellent arch support PU foxing for the toe box Brand name embossed on the heel Outsole TPR outsole for durability Diamond grooves on the forefoot and front heel, with horizontal grooves in the back heel and diagonal grooves along the shoe periphery for maximum traction Shoe careKnock off loose dirt by smacking the sneakers togetherWipe with a damp cloth to remove caked dirtRinse shoes with warm water Scrub with mild detergent using a gentle toothbrushUse a non-bleaching soap for coloured canvasRinse off with cool water
